title: salacia lateritia
intro: Salacia lateritia, also known as Indian sandalwood, is a plant species in the family Celastraceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Salacia lateritia include its potential to help manage diabetes, reduce cholesterol levels, and aid in weight loss. Herbal preparations of Salacia lateritia include teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
